title: Embers of the Parish
description: The weeping tree burned, and what slept beneath its roots woke hungry. The Hollows remember who lit the match.

scenes.description: Ash falls like snow over the black water. The tree's stump still glows, and around it the ground has split into smoking rents.

choices.label: Descend into the rents
choices.resultText: You climb down through smoke into the root-hollow, where coffin-wood glows like coals.

choices.label: Circle the stump warily
choices.resultText: You keep your distance. Something below exhales, slow and patient.

scenes.description: Beneath the stump, the parish's true founder lies in a cradle of roots — awake now, its grave-shroud smouldering.

choices.label: Offer the founder your torch
choices.resultText: It takes the flame like a debt repaid, folds its hands, and lets the fire finish what you started. The Hollows go quiet — scoured, but at peace.
